subject: feat(theme): add DaisyUI theming with dark/light mode toggle
body:
Install Tailwind CSS v4 + DaisyUI v5. Set up dual-layer theming:
.dark class (Tailwind dark: variant) + data-theme attribute (DaisyUI
component colors) + color-scheme (native form elements). Bridge
existing CSS custom variables to DaisyUI semantic tokens so all 444
var() references respond to theme changes automatically. Theme-aware
Cytoscape stylesheet adapts node/edge label colors per mode.

- Theme combo: pastel (light) + dark (dark), extensible for more combos
- Flash prevention inline script in index.html
- Cross-tab sync via storage event
- OS preference fallback on first visit
- PWA meta theme-color updates on toggle

Tags: theme, daisyui, tailwind, dark-mode, infrastructure
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: minor

title: add DaisyUI theming with dark/light mode toggle
